citations.description: Session log 7ec6: 'NOW closing epic 81e2 (verifier reads local worktree tree which has all changes; will close UNSIGNED because 955c is force-closed => certifiable:false soft path, per design)' — this close was stated as the next step but the epic status remains in_progress

findings.criterion: All child stories are closed and their changes are landed on `main`. (Epic itself status)
findings.detail: The epic ticket 81e2-ad5e-bfe2-4653 has status `in_progress`, not `closed`. While all 7 child stories are individually closed and the session log attests the 5-change Gerrit stack was merged, the epic itself has not been transitioned to closed. AC1 as written ('All child stories are closed and their changes are landed on main') is satisfied for children, but the epic's own closure — which is what a completion check on the epic verifies — has not been performed.
findings.remediation: Close the epic ticket (`rebar transition 81e2-ad5e-bfe2-4653 in_progress closed`) once the completion-verifier gate is satisfied.

citations.description: Contains 'examples/claude-skills' as part of a frozen eval corpus finding (finding_id f0bc77fa9e5c47e8a, decision=dropped)
search_files query 'examples/claude-skills' returned exactly one hit in docs/experiments/plan-review-gate/runs/adjudication_corpus.jsonl:362
Child story 46f8 comment: 'the ONLY remaining match is docs/experiments/plan-review-gate/runs/adjudication_corpus.jsonl:362 — a FROZEN plan-review eval corpus... Left untouched by design.'

findings.criterion: The example skills directory is provider-neutral (renamed from `examples/claude-skills`) and `make lint && make test` pass on the merged result. Proving: `rg -l 'examples/claude-skills' . | wc -l` returns 0
findings.detail: The proving command `rg -l 'examples/claude-skills' . | wc -l` does NOT return 0 in the current repo state — it returns 1 because `docs/experiments/plan-review-gate/runs/adjudication_corpus.jsonl` contains a verbatim historical `examples/claude-skills` string (line 362, inside a frozen eval corpus finding). The directory rename itself is correct and all live path references are gone, but the literal proving criterion ('returns 0') is not met. The child story 46f8 records this as a deliberate carve-out, but the AC text requires the count to reach 0.

data.remediation: How to resolve the unmet criteria: for each one, decide whether the work is genuinely incomplete or simply undocumented. If a requirement is already satisfied but the proof is not discoverable from the code alone, add a comment to this ticket that documents the evidence — cite the concrete artifacts that meet the requirement (file paths and line ranges, commands and their output, links, or the reasoning that ties the work to the criterion). The completion verifier reads this ticket's comments, so evidence you record there is taken into account on the next verification. For any criterion whose work is genuinely unfinished, complete it, then re-verify.
